since_last: 31% of 85 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +2.61%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 31% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -1.09% · BTC -1.55% · Gold -1.11% · Nasdaq100 -0.59%. 31% of 85 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +2.61%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +2.61%; weakest is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at -2.99%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: ARM is the standout at +9.52%
cards.body: Leaders: ARM +9.52%, SMR +7.89%, MRVL +7.83%, VRT +7.71%, AMAT +5.95%. Laggards: SPCX -6.94%, SNAP -6.40%, APP -6.16%, META -4.86%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -6.94% at $196.71
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -6.94% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
